payload.evidence: The second reviewed Phase 7 correction removes the unconditional failing promotion job, makes repository identity mismatches fail explicitly, binds every exact-five execution proof to its independently verified build receipt platform/target/runner/artifact-name/SHA-256 tuple, and records PowerShell publication as controlled-unsupported after authentication and before destination mutation. Focused execution/build/workflow/release tests and workspace fmt/test/clippy pass locally. The no-trust premerge reached the required external Phase 5 registry boundary after Phases 1-4 passed. No Windows runner or remote workflow executed; Phase 6 live P0-P7, provenance, Windows safe publication, five-platform equivalence, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, release authority, promotion, and Phase 8 remain pending or blocked.

payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its pre-existing authoritative-state refusal","removed the always-failing promotion job and release-authority workflow path","changed repository identity from a job-level skip to an explicit failing step check","cross-bound exact-five execution proofs to independently verified build artifact tuples","replaced cloned and relabeled receipt acceptance with five independently constructed closed verifier documents and tuple substitution adversaries","changed PowerShell publication to deterministic controlled unsupported before destination inspection or mutation","made the Windows runner execute only authenticated direct bytes for controlled-unsupported results","ran focused workspace framework and no-trust boundary validation without external mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["retain exactly six V1 core commands and four separate bridge commands","allow a successful non-promotable diagnostic to finish green while authority remains blocked in receipts and docs","require exact platform runner target artifact name and digest equality with verified build receipts","make Windows installer publication unsupported rather than claim race-free path publication","leave every US-112 proof flag zero and all acceptance promotion and Phase 8 authorities blocked"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","candidate 0be088b contained an unconditional failing promotion job and execution proofs not bound to build artifact tuples","candidate 0be088b retained a PowerShell path-copy TOCTOU risk","the no-trust premerge stopped as designed because the external Phase 5 trusted-owner registry and digest were not supplied"]
payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap still cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative state is unavailable. Matrix queries and CLI-authored records remained unavailable, so this correction preserves that state and supplies one additive replayable changeset without rewriting history.
payload.notes: Detailed second-correction trace. Local macOS Bash/direct execution and static PowerShell refusal checks ran; native PowerShell and five remote runners did not. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, publish, signing, attestation, promotion, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, or Phase 8 action occurred.
payload.task_summary: Corrected Phase 7 diagnostic authority build cross-binding and Windows publication claims
